creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
Looking at the x265 commit log, I can see that 3 last commits (3263e3ca8f70c2051a713742b9f0bd727529d562, d91a3bbe622bfd57a248bf81bc3aa7df5e525938, and 88c12b53a49ce5d7686cfcda9e2409ed3c1bd0f2 in reverse chronological order) are no more that dumb checksum update for the patch due to upstream updating their git version. In fact, this is 4th time it happens for x265 -- eceefb231d28830d4ae927f722d6a8d650f5bd92.

I'd like to ask putting the patch directly into the ports tree so this wouldn't happen anymore.
